cluster_label: My hands can do more now
product_name: Lamaze Freddie The Firefly Soft Toy
product_description_under_30_words: A soft Lamaze Freddie Firefly with layered wings, a peekaboo mirror, clinking rings and a tethered ladybird teether, plus a clip for the pram or playmat edge.
ember_verdict: Hands are aiming more now, not just brushing past toys. Freddie gives several places to grab and something to mouth once the hold sticks. Clip him where they can see him during floor play so a reach has a clear target within arm reach on the mat.
rank_rationale: #1 over #2: more grab points and a mirror.
buying_factor_memo: Order followed grab-target clarity, mouthing safety, max two per brand, review depth, and live UK buyability.

cluster_label: My hands can do more now
product_description_under_30_words: A soft Lamaze Captain Calamari octopus with long grabable legs and mixed textures, sized so both hands can catch hold during supervised floor or pram play.
ember_verdict: Single hand brushes are turning into proper holds. Long soft legs give a bigger target when aim is still wobbly. Keep play on the mat so a triumphant grab does not end under the sofa cushions again, and stay within arm reach the whole time.
rank_rationale: #2 over #3: bigger grab target than Sophie for two-hand tries.
buying_factor_memo: Order followed grab-target clarity, mouthing safety, max two per brand, review depth, and live UK buyability.

cluster_label: My hands can do more now
product_description_under_30_words: The original Sophie La Girafe natural rubber teether with soft limbs and a gentle squeak, light enough for small hands to lift toward the mouth during floor play.
ember_verdict: Reaching often ends in the mouth at this age. Soft Sophie legs give something to catch and chew without hard plastic edges. Wipe clean only; she is not dishwasher gear for the steriliser cycle. Keep sessions short and stay within arm reach on the floor.
rank_rationale: #3 over #4: classic limb grab beats ring for first holds.
buying_factor_memo: Order followed grab-target clarity, mouthing safety, max two per brand, review depth, and live UK buyability.

cluster_label: My hands can do more now
product_description_under_30_words: A Sophie La Girafe So Pure teething ring with sliding geometric shapes and varied chew surfaces, light for small hands to lift and mouth on the playmat.
ember_verdict: Some babies prefer a ring they can slide and chew over a giraffe body. The textures reward a successful grab with something interesting on the gums. Keep this as the second Sophie shape, not a third Sophie buy in the same basket.
rank_rationale: #4 over #5: clearer chew-grab than a multi-piece gift pack.

cluster_label: My hands can do more now
product_description_under_30_words: A Playgro Jungle Friends gift pack with wrist rattles, soft foot finders and three textured linking teethers, giving several grabable pieces for supervised floor play.
ember_verdict: A single toy can bore a determined grabber. This pack spreads reaches across links, wrists and feet without buying five separate pieces. Use the linking teethers on the mat first if the soft foot pieces feel fiddly at four months old.
rank_rationale: #5: value multi-piece set; less single-toy clarity than Freddie or Sophie.
buying_factor_memo: Order followed grab-target clarity, mouthing safety, max two per brand, review depth, and live UK buyability.
